name: Cathy Hughes
abstract: Catherine Liggins Hughes (born Catherine Elizabeth Woods; April 22, 1947) is an American entrepreneur, radio and television personality and business executive. She has been listed as the second-richest Black woman in the United States, after Oprah Winfrey.

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: I knew Cathy Hughes... Nice lady... I was very proud to be a part of her Legends Ball. She loves me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
